seo.title: Seedream 5.0 Pro - Professional ByteDance Image Generation | MaxVideoAI
seo.description: Create professional still images, dense infographics, visual edits, and 4K campaign assets with Seedream 5.0 Pro in MaxVideoAI.

overview: Seedream 5.0 Pro is the professional ByteDance image route in MaxVideoAI. Use it for dense infographics, advanced edits, multilingual visual layouts, cinematic stills, and polished reference frames before animation.
pricingNotes: Seedream 5.0 Pro is exposed as a single-image professional output route. MaxVideoAI shows the exact live quote before generation.

hero.title: Seedream 5.0 Pro - professional image production
hero.intro: Use Seedream Pro for high-detail stills, structured infographics, controlled edits, and 4K campaign-ready images.

items.title: Complex image edits with multiple references

tips.title: Production notes
items: Use Pro when the page needs hierarchy, labels, text, or a dense composition.
Keep the brief structured: subject, layout, visual hierarchy, text elements, and lighting.
Use Seedream Lite for fast batches; Pro is exposed as one professional image per request.
Prepare the approved still before sending it to Seedance for motion.

prompts.title: Clean-energy city infographic
prompts.prompt: Create a cinematic high-density infographic about a clean-energy city district, layered map view, legible labels, data callouts, glass UI overlays, premium editorial lighting.

prompts.title: Campaign production edit
prompts.prompt: Transform these references into one cohesive campaign visual: preserve product shape, merge the architectural backdrop, add dramatic rim light, and keep all typography clean.

faqs.q: How is Seedream 5.0 Pro different from Seedream 5.0 Lite?
faqs.a: Use Pro for professional finals, dense infographics, complex edits, and 4K campaign stills. Use Lite for faster image sets and reference preparation.

faqs.q: Does Seedream 5.0 Pro support batch output?
faqs.a: No. MaxVideoAI exposes Seedream 5.0 Pro as one generated image per request to match the direct provider route.

custom.heroSupportLine: Best for professional still images, dense layouts, and 4K visual production.
custom.heroDesc1: Seedream 5.0 Pro is the ByteDance route for visual work that needs hierarchy, labels, polished composition, and professional finish.
custom.heroDesc2: It complements Seedream Lite: Lite is for fast sets and reference prep; Pro is for the image you want to present or animate.
heroHighlights: Professional composition||Use Pro for dense infographics, campaign images, and visual explainers.
Controlled editing||Bring multiple references into one polished image with precise preserve/change instructions.
4K-ready stills||Generate final source frames before Seedance animation.

specSections.title: Seedream Pro options
items: Reference input supports up to 10 images.
Batch/sequential image generation is not exposed for Pro.

strengths: Use for infographics, text-heavy visuals, and complex layouts.
Describe hierarchy and label placement explicitly.
Use references with clear roles: subject, style, background, or typography.
boundaries: Use Seedream Lite for batch image sets.
Seedance still evaluates any image before video generation.
custom.relatedSubtitle: Use Lite for speed and image sets; use Pro for the polished image.

relatedItems.title: Seedream 5.0 Lite
relatedItems.description: Use for faster reference frames, batch image sets, and source prep before Seedance.

relatedItems.title: Seedance 2.0
relatedItems.description: Animate approved Seedream stills into video once the source frame is ready.

safetyRules: No sexual content or content involving minors.
No hateful, harassing, or graphic-violence requests.
Do not impersonate real people or public figures without consent.

section.title: How to prompt Seedream Pro
section.intro: Write it like an art-director brief: visual goal, composition, hierarchy, copy/text constraints, materials, and lighting.

imageExamples.title: Seedream 5.0 Pro image prompt examples
imageExamples.intro: Use these for campaign stills, typography posters, reference edits and 2K-to-4K finals.

items.title: Campaign still
items.prompt: 2K campaign still for an amber perfume bottle on white acrylic, soft studio key light, clean shadow, exact headline "AURA NOIRE" top-left, small logo lockup bottom edge.

items.title: Typography poster
items.prompt: Vertical 4K poster, premium editorial grid, graphite background, exact headline "MIDNIGHT LAUNCH", subhead "LIMITED DROP", crisp hierarchy, generous margins, readable text.

items.title: Reference edit
items.prompt: Using this product reference, keep the shape, logo and proportions. Change the scene to a midnight-blue studio, improve reflections, remove dust and fingerprints.

items.title: 2K to 4K final
items.prompt: Rerun the approved 2K composition as a 4K final. Sharpen fine details, keep typography identical, preserve brand colors, product position and the locked framing.
